page: Google Cloud Platform a3-highgpu-4g is an accelerator-optimized server powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 104 vCPUs and 52 physical cores on the x86_64 architecture. The CPU operates at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz and features a 105 MB L3 cache. It supports advanced instruction sets including Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions and AVX-512, which accelerate matrix mathematics and vector operations. The system is equipped with 936 GB of system memory, providing 9.0 GB of RAM per core.

For hardware acceleration, the server integrates four NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs delivering a combined 319 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of 3216 GB of NVMe SSD capacity. This hardware configuration is designed for high-throughput parallel processing, rapid data ingestion, and massive memory bandwidth.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core CPU performance, with a PassMark CPU score of 86938.94 placing it in the top 10% tier. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 6842.06 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 216.58 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads. In image processing benchmarks, the server achieves top-tier performance. Large language model text generation speeds reach 38.11 tokens per second on a medium 7B model and 4.61 tokens per second on a large 70B model.

Given the dense integration of four enterprise-grade H100 GPUs, massive system memory, and local NVMe SSDs, this server represents a high-resource-density profile optimized for specialized workloads. It is highly suited for large-scale machine learning training, LLM inference, high-performance computing, image processing, and database operations requiring fast local storage.
description: Google Cloud Platform a3-highgpu-4g is an accelerator-optimized server designed for high-performance parallel computing. It features an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 104 vCPUs, 936 GB of system memory, and four NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs providing 319 GB of total VRAM. Local storage is supported by 3216 GB of NVMe SSD capacity. The server demonstrates exceptional multi-core processing capabilities, with a PassMark CPU score in the top 10% tier and strong memory bandwidth performance. It is highly optimized for workloads such as large language model inference, deep learning training, image processing, and intensive database operations.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform a3-highgpu-4g features 104 vCPUs, 936 GB RAM, 4 NVIDIA H100 GPUs with 319 GB VRAM, and 3216 GB NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier performance for AI and HPC workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform a3-highgpu-4g is an accelerator-optimized server with 104 vCPUs, 936 GB RAM, and 4 NVIDIA H100 GPUs for AI and HPC.
tagline: An accelerator-optimized platform featuring four NVIDIA H100 GPUs and high-speed NVMe storage for demanding machine learning and parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs with 319 GB of total VRAM
104 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8481C with AMX and AVX-512 support
936 GB of system memory and 3216 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU and image processing benchmark performance
Optimized for LLM inference, machine learning training, and database operations
